name: Re-evolution
acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - D-Jewel Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Gain 35 Aliemus at the start of exploration. After using Exalt in this battle, gain 2 Aliemus at turn end. This effect can stack up to 3 times.

lore: Proliferate, proliferate! Let the souls infused with the blood of the Mother Tree spread across the world.
